visual_description: In a dimly lit, green‑tinged interior, a man with short white hair in a suit and an earpiece watches a man in a black studded jacket who bends forward and moves out of the frame. The white‑haired man turns his head, his face showing a serious, attentive expression as he looks around the room. He remains standing, his posture upright, while the background shows a dark doorway and a wall with a faint pattern.
audio_description: Audio is quiet with a low hum and a faint off‑screen voice audible.
